proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e=0`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `egfr_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `kras_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: BRAF V600E lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in other lines; mean difference was -0.5552.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

analyses.result_summary: EGFR-amplified lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in other lines; mean difference was -0.3486.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

analyses.result_summary: ERBB2-amplified lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in other lines; mean difference was -0.4321.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

analyses.result_summary: KRAS-mutant lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 in other lines; mean difference was -0.3075.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `nf1_loss=0`.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `apc_mutation=0`.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `myc_amplification=0`.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `copy_number_8q24` (`copy_number_8q24 >= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: NF1-loss lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in other lines; mean difference was -0.0955.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

analyses.result_summary: APC-mutant lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.5447 versus -0.2526 in other lines; mean difference was -0.2921.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

analyses.result_summary: MYC-amplified lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3614 versus -0.2523 in other lines; mean difference was -0.1091.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile `copy_number_8q24` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3440 versus -0.2452 in other lines; mean difference was -0.0988.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, group mean minus complement mean

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` and `dependency_TMED10` scores.
Higher `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` is associated with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.
Higher `wnt_activity_score` is associated with more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores.

analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_POLR2A`, each one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` was associated with a -0.0612 score change.
analyses.method: Simple linear regression on standardized continuous predictor

analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_TMED10`, each one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` was associated with a -0.0203 score change.
analyses.method: Simple linear regression on standardized continuous predictor

analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_DHX9`, each one-standard-deviation increase in `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` was associated with a -0.0172 score change.
analyses.method: Simple linear regression on standardized continuous predictor

analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_KIF18A`, each one-standard-deviation increase in `wnt_activity_score` was associated with a -0.0973 score change.
analyses.method: Simple linear regression on standardized continuous predictor

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `braf_v600e=1` effect on `dependency_BRAF` is stronger in `lineage=skin` cell lines than in non-skin cell lines.
The `kras_mutation=1` effect on `dependency_KRAS` is stronger in `lineage=pancreatic` cell lines than in non-pancreatic cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: The BRAF V600E by skin-lineage interaction was small and not significant: BRAF V600E effect -0.5640 in skin versus -0.5514 outside skin; interaction -0.0126.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with binary driver, binary modifier, and driver-by-modifier term

analyses.result_summary: The KRAS mutation by pancreatic-lineage interaction was not significant: KRAS mutation effect -0.3102 in pancreatic versus -0.3074 outside pancreatic; interaction -0.0028.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with binary driver, binary modifier, and driver-by-modifier term

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `erbb2_amplification=1` cell lines, `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched` has more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than expected from ERBB2 amplification alone.
Cell lines with both `nf1_loss=1` and `lineage=brain` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores, with a stronger NF1-loss effect in brain than outside brain.

analyses.result_summary: `erbb2_amplification=1` and `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched` lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.7525 versus -0.2944 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.4581.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: The ERBB2 amplification effect was stronger in HER2-enriched subtype: amplification effect -0.4973 inside HER2-enriched versus -0.4302 outside; interaction -0.0671.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1` and `lineage=brain` lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.1397.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: The NF1-loss effect was stronger in brain: NF1-loss effect -0.1496 in brain versus -0.0913 outside brain; interaction -0.0582.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `apc_mutation=1`, `lineage=colorectal`, and top-quartile `wnt_activity_score` (`wnt_activity_score >= 0.819`) have much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
Within the APC/colorectal/WNT-high context, `smad4_loss=0` enables strong `dependency_KIF18A` while `smad4_loss=1` suppresses it.

analyses.result_summary: `apc_mutation=1`, `lineage=colorectal`, and `wnt_activity_score >= 0.819` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.1119 versus -0.2530 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.8589.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: The APC effect was highly colorectal-specific: APC effect -0.6833 inside colorectal versus -0.0011 outside colorectal; interaction -0.6822.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

analyses.result_summary: `apc_mutation=1`, `lineage=colorectal`, `wnt_activity_score >= 0.819`, and `smad4_loss=0` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2990 versus -0.2530 in other lines; subgroup difference was -1.0460.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: SMAD4 loss suppressed the APC-associated KIF18A dependency: APC effect -0.0096 when `smad4_loss=1` versus -0.3418 when `smad4_loss=0`; interaction +0.3322.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1`, top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` (`growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`), and bottom-quartile `rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm` (`rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm <= 1.956`) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`, and `rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm <= 1.956` lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.3556 versus -0.2534 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.1022.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement after systematic subgroup search

analyses.result_summary: NF1 loss showed stronger TMED10 dependency in ASCL2-low lines: NF1-loss effect -0.0359 in ASCL2-low versus -0.0063 outside ASCL2-low; interaction -0.0296.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with top-quartile `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` (`rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669`) and top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` (`growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.

Cell lines with `lineage_subtype=squamous`, bottom-quartile `ploidy` (`ploidy <= 2.332`), and top-quartile `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` (`rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669`) have especially negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.

analyses.result_summary: `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.0595.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: The MYC-high by growth-high interaction for DHX9 was negative but not significant: interaction -0.0133.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

analyses.result_summary: `lineage_subtype=squamous`, `ploidy <= 2.332`, and `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669` lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.4676 versus -0.3333 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.1343.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement after targeted triplet search

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` (`growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores, and this effect is stronger in `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched`.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` and top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` (`growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` and top-quartile `stemness_score` (`stemness_score >= 0.654`) have especially negative `dependency_RPL11` scores.

analyses.result_summary: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.1043.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for high-growth subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: The growth-rate effect on POLR2A was stronger in HER2-enriched subtype: high-growth effect -0.1584 in HER2-enriched versus -0.1032 outside; interaction -0.0551.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification=1` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3936 versus -0.2632 in other lines; subgroup difference was -0.1303.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test for complete subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: The MYC-amplification by high-growth interaction for RPL11 was not significant: interaction -0.0140.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

analyses.result_summary: MYC-amplification had a stronger RPL11 effect in stemness-high lines: MYC-amplification effect -0.1356 in stemness-high versus -0.1004 outside; interaction -0.0352.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model with driver-by-modifier term

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final subgroup for `dependency_BRAF`: cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other cell lines.
Final subgroup for `dependency_EGFR`: cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than all other cell lines.
Final subgroup for `dependency_ERBB2`: cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` and `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all other cell lines.
Final subgroup for `dependency_KRAS`: cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other cell lines.
Final subgroup for `dependency_RIT1`: cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` and `lineage=brain` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all other cell lines.

Final subgroup for `dependency_KIF18A`: cell lines with `apc_mutation=1`, `lineage=colorectal`, `wnt_activity_score >= 0.819`, and `smad4_loss=0` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

Final exploratory subgroup for `dependency_TMED10`: cell lines with `nf1_loss=1`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`, and `rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm <= 1.956` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other cell lines.

Final subgroup for `dependency_DHX9`: cell lines with `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other cell lines.
Final subgroup for `dependency_POLR2A`: cell lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other cell lines.
Final subgroup for `dependency_RPL11`: cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search did not find a reproducible modifier stronger than the primary BRAF V600E lesion; `braf_v600e=1` remained the final subgroup with mean difference -0.5552.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search supported `egfr_amplification=1` as the main EGFR dependency subgroup; mean difference was -0.3486.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected ERBB2 amplification plus HER2-enriched subtype as the strongest interpretable ERBB2 subgroup; mean difference was -0.4581.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search did not improve materially over the primary KRAS-mutant subgroup; `kras_mutation=1` mean difference was -0.3075.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected NF1 loss plus brain lineage as the best RIT1 subgroup; mean difference was -0.1397.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected APC mutation, colorectal lineage, WNT-high state, and intact SMAD4 as the strongest KIF18A subgroup; mean difference was -1.0460.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, targeted triplets, and final four-predicate refinement; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search found only a modest TMED10 subgroup: NF1 loss, high growth, and ASCL2-low expression; mean difference was -0.1022.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search supported high MYC expression plus high growth as the most robust DHX9 subgroup; mean difference was -0.0595.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search showed POLR2A dependency is primarily proliferation-associated; high-growth lines had mean difference -0.1043.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected MYC amplification plus high growth as the strongest robust RPL11 subgroup; mean difference was -0.1303.
analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over 88 single predicates, 3652 paired predicates, and targeted triplets; final Welch test
